untranslatable_reason: Volume pattern shape (neither U-shaped nor dome-shaped) cannot be directly expressed using available indicators. This requires analyzing the curvature/shape of volume bars over multiple periods, which is not supported by the indicator set. Approximated with low volume ratio and low volatility as proxies for the absence of strong volume patterns, but true H&S pattern requires visual price structure (three peaks with lower highs on sides) which is not captured by the conversion table provided.
